update_message:
Changelog: v3.8.0

  1. Add remote control to manage services in real time
  2. Improve the speed of root detection code
  3. Anti-Hook/Instrumentation has been improved
  4. Fixed a bug that caused a crash
  5. Time format using localtime
  6. Remove armeabi-v7a to make apk size smaller
  7. Optimize most of the code for efficiency and processing speed
